paper.title: Lory: Fully Differentiable Mixture-of-Experts for Autoregressive Language Model Pre-training

nodes.title: Abstract
nodes.preview: Mixture-of-experts (MoE) models facilitate efficient scaling; however, training the router network introduces the challenge of optimizing a non-differentiable, discrete objective.
